decisions.rationale: Source block p003_c0012 merely states 'low floor buses are out on the streets now' as a factual observation about current conditions. The surrounding context shows the commenter suggesting low-floor buses as an independent alternative to the Transitway; the answer does not attach low-floor buses to the Transitway project itself. No explicit attachment to any project or corridor.
